source_pr.title: gc: use tmp session in gc_worker instead of global singleton.
source_pr.body: Previously multi threads in GCWorker use one Session, which may cause we can't get a good transaction when we execute SQLs. Now we make them use tmp sessions to resolve that.

symptoms: - wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
failure_signature: - wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
root_cause_explanation: GCWorker used a shared session and a non-atomic running flag across goroutines, and some tests relied on waiting for session creation to avoid a race. This PR removes the racy shared state by using atomic coordination and creating isolated sessions for GC SQL operations.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing a Session across goroutines (use temp sessions + atomic state) to eliminate GCWorker races.

evidence: evidence: - wg.Wait() // Wait create session finish in worker, some test code depend on this to avoid race.
